chunks.text: Cory 3F Networks Offline, Morning of Tue. 6/25 | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Cory 3F Networks Offline, Morning of Tue. 6/25 Due to planned electrical work, all Cory Hall third floor wired and wireless

ork, all Cory Hall third floor wired and wireless networks will be offline during the morning on Tuesday, June 25th. Per facilities, power (and therefore network) will be unavailable between 7:30am and 12:30pm. The network, particularly wi-fi, may ta

d 12:30pm. The network, particularly wi-fi, may take as long as 15 minutes to fully come online after power is restored. Please contact us at help@eecs.berkeley.edu if you have any questions. UPDATE [2024-06-25 | larsrohr ] Resolved as of 2024-06-25

2024-06-25 | larsrohr ] Resolved as of 2024-06-25 1:00pm Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
